name: test_next_timestamp_uses_step_size
descriptionHtml:
The timestamp passed to Prophet.predict() must equal start_date + curr_step * step_size, NOT start_date + curr_step.

    With step_size=180, after 6 data points curr_step==6, so the
    expected next timestamp is start_date + 1080 seconds, not
    start_date + 6 seconds.
